steps.title: Use the slope direction
steps.content: The displayed best-fit line falls from left to right, so its slope is negative. This eliminates the choices with positive slope.

steps.title: Use the intercept
steps.content: The line crosses the $y$-axis near $2.3$, not near $16.3$. The equation with negative slope and that intercept is $y=-x+2.3$. The answer is D.
